name: Margarita Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 Peel of orange; cut into continuous spiral strips
1 Peel of lime; cut into continuous spiral strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Share a shot of tequila with a friend while making this.
2. Add citrus peel to the remaining tequila in the bottle, cutting each strip lengthwise.
3. Pour the Cointreau into the bottle and stir gently until combined.
4. Keep refrigerated.
5. Serve in sherry glasses.
6. Remove any citrus peel if the liqueur starts to become bitter.
7. It can be served straight or on the rocks with a twist of orange peel.
Take a bottle of this to the host of a dinner party instead of a bottle of wine.
